title: Update footer attribution and add 360-degree vehicle images

requirements.text: In `frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx`, update the attribution/credit line to read 'Built with using caffeine.ai Swaroop Team'. The existing deep-green background, brand info, navigation links, and contact details must remain unchanged.

quotes: change to built with using caffeine.ai Swaroop Team

acceptanceCriteria: The footer attribution line reads 'Built with using caffeine.ai Swaroop Team'
No other footer content (links, contact info, background color) is altered

requirements.text: In `frontend/src/pages/Vehicles.tsx`, replace the current placeholder images on each vehicle card with generated 360-degree-style vehicle images. Each of the six vehicles (Innova Crysta, Fortuner, Ertiga, Tempo Traveller, Force Traveller, Luxury Coach) must display its own photorealistic image stored in `frontend/public/assets/generated`. The card layout, vehicle name, capacity, features, and badge labels must remain intact.

quotes: vehicles place the correct vehicles pictures 360 degree pictures

acceptanceCriteria: Each vehicle card on the Vehicles page shows a unique photorealistic 360-degree-style image of that specific vehicle
All six vehicles (Innova Crysta, Fortuner, Ertiga, Tempo Traveller, Force Traveller, Luxury Coach) have distinct images
Card content (name, type, capacity, features, badge) remains unchanged
Images are responsive and maintain aspect ratio within their cards

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/
Do not modify frontend/src/main.tsx or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not alter any other pages or components beyond Footer.tsx and Vehicles.tsx
nonGoals: Changing the header design or cycling words animation
Modifying the Home page destination cards or hero section
Updating backend data models or rating logic
Adding real-time 360-degree spin interactivity (static photorealistic images only)

required: Photorealistic 360-degree exterior view of a Toyota Innova Crysta MPV in white, studio lighting on a neutral background (innova-crysta-360.dim_800x500.png)
Photorealistic 360-degree exterior view of a Toyota Fortuner SUV in silver, studio lighting on a neutral background (fortuner-360.dim_800x500.png)
Photorealistic 360-degree exterior view of a Maruti Suzuki Ertiga MPV in grey, studio lighting on a neutral background (ertiga-360.dim_800x500.png)
Photorealistic 360-degree exterior view of a Tempo Traveller 12-seater van in white, studio lighting on a neutral background (tempo-traveller-360.dim_800x500.png)
Photorealistic 360-degree exterior view of a Force Traveller mini-bus in white, studio lighting on a neutral background (force-traveller-360.dim_800x500.png)
Photorealistic 360-degree exterior view of a Luxury Coach tour bus in white and gold livery, studio lighting on a neutral background (luxury-coach-360.dim_800x500.png)
